problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Atomic. Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating directly addresses this.
